data.content:
This is an MSTest project. Use the `--filter` option with `TestCategory`:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the 3 tests marked with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`:
- `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`
- `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`
- `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`
